data.title: Getting Started with the Static Boilerplate
data.excerpt: Everything you need to know to start building with this static site boilerplate.
data.content:
## Quick Start

```bash
npm install
npx tsx build.ts
```

That's it. Your site is now in `dist/` — open `dist/index.html` in a browser.

## Project Structure

- `cms.config.ts` — collection and field definitions
- `build.ts` — static site generator
- `content/` — JSON content files (one per document)
- `public/uploads/` — media files (images, PDFs, etc.)
- `dist/` — build output (deploy this folder)

## Adding Content

You can edit content in two ways:

1. **CMS Admin** — run `npx @webhouse/cms-admin-cli` and edit visually
2. **JSON files** — edit `content/posts/*.json` directly

## Adding a New Post

Create a new file in `content/posts/`:

```json
{
  "slug": "my-new-post",
  "status": "published",
  "data": {
    "title": "My New Post",
    "excerpt": "A short summary.",
    "content": "## Hello\n\nThis is my post.",
    "date": "2026-03-28",
    "author": "Your Name"
  },
  "id": "my-new-post",
  "_fieldMeta": {}
}
```

Then rebuild: `npx tsx build.ts`
data.author: webhouse.app
